why: CHART: failed 7531.9 breakout triggered sharp trend-down, 3 consecutive lower-low 5min candles broke the range floor (7508) to new day lows 7506, price below VWAP 7519.75, momentum 15m -0.31%. GEX CONFIRM: regime flipped +7M to -28M deep NEGATIVE-gamma (fuel/levels break) + king barney 7505 at spot just broke = accelerant; target 7495 pika, potential flush-through.

Thesis broke: V-reversal off 7506 low reclaimed broken 7508-7511 support, spot 7514 approaching VWAP, 5min momentum flipped positive, negative gamma eased -29M to -17M. Break-flush failed (range low held like at 10:00). Cut loss per manage rule.

CHART: after flushing to day-low 7494.7, price retested UP into broken 7505 level = now resistance; downtrend intact, below VWAP 7518.5, momentum 15m -0.19%. GEX CONFIRM: deep NEGATIVE-gamma -30M (levels break/trend extends), 7505 barney (-9.9M) overhead repels; target break of 7495 pika toward 7480 barney accelerant, air below. With-trend at-resistance entry (vs earlier chase).

Non-working trade cut at scratch. 7495 floor held 5+ tests over ~30min despite king migrating to 7480 and gamma -42M; price stuck in 7495-7512 range chop, back at 7505 barney with momentum flipped positive again. Tape (range/floor-holding) overrides the bearish map. Preserve capital, wait for a cleaner break.

CHART: multi-hour 7515-7520 coil rejected the 7520 barney and broke back below VWAP 7515.2, momentum turned negative 15m -0.07%, rolling from range top. GEX CONFIRM: gamma exploded to -54M (deepest of day = violent/trending), 7515 barney now overhead resistance, 7495 pika floor eroded to +4.0M (HALF its morning strength = hollow now), king barney 7480 below = target. With-trend at-VWAP-resistance entry, tight invalidation >7517; target 7508->7495 break->7480.

CAP winner +0.10%. Price stalled 3 candles at the 7505 barney king (-17M magnet), down-momentum decelerating (5m -0.02%), flush not accelerating despite -92M/no-floor. Banking ~7.5pts from 7513.46 entry per method-4 (0DTE winners round-trip; cap into the node where the move pauses; theta bleeds the long-put on a pin). Re-short if a fresh break sets up.

CHART: confirmed DOWNTREND after 72pt crash (7517->7445); dead-cat bounce retraced exactly into the 7480 barney = broken-support-turned-resistance, far below VWAP 7511.5. GEX CONFIRM: extreme -142M negative gamma (violent trending down), 7480 barney (-20M) strong overhead resistance, floor 7410 weakening fast (1mDelta-0.9) = downside room. With-trend at-resistance entry (same type as winning 12:37 short); tight invalidation on reclaim >7488; target 7460->7445->7410.

Invalidation honored at -0.14%. Dead-cat bounce broke back through the 7480 barney to 7489, closing the candle at its high with up-momentum (5m +0.18%), above my 7485-7488 stop. My entry thesis (7480 rejects) failed. Cutting rather than loosening the stop toward 7505. Will re-short if the bounce hits the stronger 7505 barney + VWAP 7510 confluence and rejects (downtrend + -151M + no-floor still intact).

CHART: deep dead-cat bounce (~86% retrace of the 72pt crash) grinded exactly into the 7505 barney + VWAP 7508 confluence = strongest resistance of the afternoon, within the larger post-crash downtrend, still below VWAP. GEX CONFIRM: extreme -149M negative gamma (violent), 7505 barney KING (-29M) + VWAP confluence overhead, NO FLOOR below = big downside room. A+ confluence rejection short (planned entry, not chop); tight invalidation >7513 (V-recovery); target 7480->7466->7445.

CAP winner +0.18% (best of day). Confluence-rejection short flushed 7508->7494; banking into the grind before a potential violent snapback (afternoon bounces have been +20pt sudden moves), 0DTE round-trips (method-4), late in session, extreme -207M whipsaw risk both ways. Strong disciplined winner locked.
